_comment: Banner-standard demo: an Infantry regiment and an Archers regiment stand a field apart (drill mode, no opponent) under a close camera, so both regimental standards -- now swallowtail pennants with a darker cloth fold, a white rim, and a brass pole finial -- read clearly with their distinct type emblems (infantry cross, archer arc). The infantry are then ordered on a short march so a standard is seen riding above a moving block as well as a standing one. Fresh scenario per the authoring rule; driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
